name: Chocolately Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Cider vinegar or white vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in sugar.
3. Add egg and blend until smooth.
4. Stir in flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
5. Mix together water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla separately.
6. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, blending well.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
8. Drop spoonfuls of cream cheese mixture over the batter.
9. Sprinkle with chocolate pieces and walnuts.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30-50 minutes until a cake tester comes out clean and the top springs back when touched.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
12. Cut into squares from the pan to serve.
